title: スプリンターズSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Her race against Taiki in the Yasuda Kinen was
such a pleasure to watch! It's hard not getting
blown away by her explosive power!

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan B
text_block_list.text:
For sure. She really uses her size to her
advantage. The way she sped up while rounding
the last corner is unforgettable!

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her run always puts me in a better mood
and gives me the energy to get through another
day. I'm glad I saw her race!

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Today'll be a great one too. Just you wait
and see!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... It's so nice to be praised.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I got AAALL my ducks lined up for our fight
today!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm goin' home the winner today! I hope you're
ready!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I sure am! Ehehe! I'm gonna do my best!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: (Thanks for letting me have my way, Trainer.)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
(You probably knew from the start what the
better path for me was, but you still let me do
this.)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
(I'll get a real good look at everyone's reactions
today. Then, I'll know for sure what to do!)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: All right! Time to do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The curtain rises on the Sprinters S. as excitement
amps up throughout the stands.
